title: HOZELOCK - Indoor Tap Connector Round ø 20mm -24mm : For Modern Threadless Kitchen Taps, Adjustable Stainless Steel Collar, Easy and Tight Connection, Loose [2177P9000], Yellow
description: From the manufacturer Round Mixer Tap Connector A flexible solution for connecting hoses to round and oval mixer taps without threads. This Indoor Round tap connector is compatible with all standard fittings. It has a maximum diameter of 24 mm. Round Mixer Tap Connector The Hozelock Round Mixer Tap Connector offers a quick and easy way to connect hoses to round, oval, or mixer taps, making it ideal for both indoor and outdoor use. Available in two sizes for taps up to 18mm or 24mm in diameter, it ensures a snug, secure fit—perfect for non-threaded taps in kitchens, bathrooms, or gardens. The universal male connector works with Hozelock fittings, and a stainless steel clip ensures a tight, leak-free seal. Two Size Options: Fits taps 14–18mm or 20–24mm wide for a secure, customised connection. Leak-Free Seal: Rubber seal grips round or oval taps tightly to prevent leaks. Use Indoors or Out: Suitable for kitchen, bathroom, or garden taps without threads. Simple Setup: Stainless steel clip adjusts easily—no tools needed for installation. How to Measure Your Garden Tap? Garden taps come in different sizes, and choosing the right Hozelock connector can be confusing. Tap sizes are based on British Standard Pipe (BSP), which measures the internal pipe diameter—not the external thread. This means your tap’s outer diameter won’t match the BSP size. Use our handy conversion guide to find the correct connector for your tap.
